title: Ability to "Add Due Date" automation BEFORE "Event Date" as opposed to only "pushing" due date to after "Event Date"
excerpt: I am working in event planning and often due dates need to be BEFORE event dates but when customizing my automation there is only the option to “push” the date as opposed to “adding”

posts.author: camilaatlas (Camila)
posts.cookedHtml: I am working in event planning and often due dates need to be BEFORE event dates but when customizing my automation there is only the option to “push” the date as opposed to “adding”
